title: Add build-time version injection to Dashboard and Server, remove hardcoded v1.1
description: 复用 CLI __CLI_VERSION__ 的 tsup/vite define 模式, 为 Dashboard 添加 __DASHBOARD_VERSION__ (vite.config.ts), 为 Server 添加 __SERVER_VERSION__ (tsup.config.ts). 替换 app.tsx:L43 硬编 v1.1 和 server/index.ts 的 0.0.0. Dashboard 首屏显示版本必须来自 package.json, 不能硬编.

files.change: Add define: { __DASHBOARD_VERSION__: JSON.stringify(pkg.version) } — import pkg from './package.json'
Replace hardcoded 'v1.1' with `v${__DASHBOARD_VERSION__}` — add declare const __DASHBOARD_VERSION__: string at top
Add define: { __SERVER_VERSION__: JSON.stringify(pkg.version) } — mirror CLI tsup.config.ts:5-13 pattern
Replace hardcoded '0.0.0' with __SERVER_VERSION__ — add declare const __SERVER_VERSION__: string

implementation: Read packages/cli/tsup.config.ts:1-20 to understand exact __CLI_VERSION__ injection pattern
Update packages/dashboard/vite.config.ts: add `import pkg from './package.json'` and `define: { __DASHBOARD_VERSION__: JSON.stringify(pkg.version) }` in defineConfig
Update packages/dashboard/src/app.tsx: add `declare const __DASHBOARD_VERSION__: string` near top; replace L43 hardcoded 'v1.1' with `v${__DASHBOARD_VERSION__}`
Update packages/server/tsup.config.ts: add `import pkg from './package.json'` and `define: { __SERVER_VERSION__: JSON.stringify(pkg.version) }` — mirror CLI pattern
Update packages/server/src/index.ts: add `declare const __SERVER_VERSION__: string`; replace hardcoded '0.0.0' with __SERVER_VERSION__
Build both packages: pnpm --filter @fabric/dashboard build && pnpm --filter @fabric/server build
Verify: grep -n 'v1\.1' packages/dashboard/src/*.tsx returns 0; check built output contains correct version string

reference.examples: tsup: define: { __CLI_VERSION__: JSON.stringify(pkg.version) }; vite: define: { __DASHBOARD_VERSION__: JSON.stringify(pkg.version) }

criteria: Dashboard built HTML/JS contains version string matching packages/dashboard/package.json.version (1.0.0)
convergence.definition_of_done: Dashboard 首屏版本号动态来自 package.json, Server MCP initialize 响应版本一致, 无任何硬编版本

rationale.chosen_approach: 复用已验证的 CLI __CLI_VERSION__ define 模式 — 零运行时开销, 构建时确定, 单一来源
alternatives_considered: 独立 version.ts 常量文件
decision_factors: 与 CLI 模式一致性
无运行时 fs.readFile 依赖
rationale.tradeoffs: 需要 vite.config 能 import package.json (resolveJsonModule: true), 但 Vite 默认支持

manual_checks: Start dev server, open Dashboard, version in header shows 1.0.0

commit.message_template: feat(dashboard+server): build-time version injection, remove hardcoded v1.1
